_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of Critical Intelligence Communication (CRITIC) identification and reporting process.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in managing AI governance review processes, including intake, triage, stakeholder coordination, assessment execution, and decision documentation.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AG domain. AG-S-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-S-005 (RM, cosine: 0.429), RM-S-001 (RM, cosine: 0.414).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.3/10 (raw 0.530). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [communication, critic, critical, identification, intelligence, knowledge] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, assessment, coordination, decision, documentation, execution] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.857 (P=0.853, R=0.862). Balanced P/R — the 10-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.0%). "Knowledge of Critical Intelligence Communication (CRITIC) identification and rep" and "Skill in managing AI governance review processes, including intake, triage, stak" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.431 < STS 0.530 (gap -0.099). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [communication, critic, critical] and [ai, assessment, coordination] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.9%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [communication, critic, critical, identification, intelligence, knowledge]. WIDAI terms: [ai, assessment, coordination, decision, documentation, execution].
